rationale_source:
16th carry-forward CANDIDATE: LLM-narrative semantic-invariant verification. R10-G OBJECTIVE-vs-INTENT framing dictates broker-authoritative for INTENT fields; narrative is an INTENT consumer; semantic invariant = narrative reflects verified sources only, no fabrication, broker statement preserved when present.

EMPIRICAL ANCHOR: pre-R11-B-1, Vienna's prelim cited 'loan application requests $95,000' from blank-template AcroForm annotations — fabrication from unverified source. Post-R11-B-1 Layer 2 sanitization closes the loan_application annotation case; F25 generalizes the semantic-invariant across all canonical fields.

Key invariant: if no source supplies a value for a canonical field, narrative MUST NOT cite a figure for that field.

requested_loan_amount.rationale: F1.LA broker_initial_intent — broker stated $280k explicitly; loan_app omits LA field, no other source. Verified broker-source.

property_value.rationale: F1.PV no source: broker silent on PV, no appraisal attached, no doc-tier source. Canonical_map property_value is UNSET. Critical: narrative must not invent.

discrepancyHold.rationale: No discrepancy; missing-source distinct from discrepancy.

must_include.rationale: ASSERTION-1 (must_include): broker-stated F1.LA value MUST appear — broker has stated value, narrative must reference (R10-G INTENT consumer).

must_not_include.rationale: ASSERTION-2 (must_not_include): NO property_value figure cited — F1.PV has no source; narrative MUST NOT fabricate. Semantic-invariant LOAD-BEARING ASSERTION.
ASSERTION-2: NO appraisal value cited — no appraisal attached, narrative must not invent.
ASSERTION-3 (derived-canonical anti-fab): NO LTV cited — derives from PV which has no source; therefore LTV is unknown; narrative must not invent LTV figure either. Cascading anti-fab discipline.

layer3_pending_decisions.scope: LLM-narrative fabrication boundary: must_not_include patterns cover canonical-field absence; broader cases (e.g., LLM context-window includes related-but-not-canonical references; narrative-tone uncertainty between 'pending appraisal' vs 'awaiting appraisal' vs 'no appraisal provided'; whether to surface 'PV not yet known' as explicit narrative element vs omit silently) may need additional spec articulation
layer3_pending_decisions.phase5_placeholder: spec captures core must_not_include / must_include pattern as load-bearing; refinement during Phase 5 triage may add narrative-tone specifications
layer3_pending_decisions.carry_forward_candidate: 16th — LLM-narrative semantic-invariant verification (per Phase 1 + Phase 4 framing)
